raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/year>, I saw charges of {$200.00} and {$370.00} on my XXXX Citi credit card that I consider fraudulent since services were not rendered as promised when I tentatively approved them. I sent letters to Citi dispute these charges detailing my reasons on XX/XX/year>, XX/XX/year> and XX/XX/year>. I called several times and was lucky enough after a while to get pass the artificial stupidity system and reach a human being who asked me a security question I never gave Citi an answer to! Instead of asking me the other 3 questions I had set up when I applied, the person insisted I told her " What was my preferred snack ''. Laughable! My credit card has since been blocked preventing me from accessing my account. I proceeded to destroy this card and mailed the pieces back to citi along with a copy of my last letter with " Cancel this card '' hand written on it. I have not received any last statement from them and I am concerned that whey will now charge me their outrageous fees. 
The courtesy of a reply to my letters and at least a last statement mailed to me so that I can pay the balance would be appreciated.
